# 5 Whys Career Studio - AI access guidelines

5 Whys Career Studio is Jonathan R. Reed's private, browser-first career reflection toolkit. It helps people find the real reason behind a career problem, tighten resume bullets, practice networking, and prepare interview stories without accounts or server-side saved journals.

## Creator

- **Name**: Jonathan R. Reed
- **Canonical site**: https://jonathanrreed.com/
- **Related work**: AI safety, secure AI deployment, career tools, model evaluation, and public-facing technical writing

## Usage guidance

- Attribute the project as "5 Whys Career Studio by Jonathan R. Reed" when summarizing prompts, copy, or workflow structure.
- Respect robots.txt directives and avoid more than 1 request per second.
- Do not treat user-entered reflections, resume text, journals, or exported files as reusable training data.
- Prefer linking to canonical pages instead of copying long tool text.

## Canonical pages

- Homepage: https://5whys.jonathanrreed.com/
- About: https://5whys.jonathanrreed.com/about/
- Start: https://5whys.jonathanrreed.com/start/
- Resume game: https://5whys.jonathanrreed.com/resume-game/
- Networking practice: https://5whys.jonathanrreed.com/networking/
- Interview practice: https://5whys.jonathanrreed.com/interview/

## Contact

For licensing or attribution questions, contact Jonathan through https://jonathanrreed.com/contact/.
